ABOUT.TITLE: About me
ABOUT.BIO1: I'm a game developer with experience in Unity, Godot, and Unreal. I specialize in mechanics design, systems programming, and VR. I'm currently completing a master's degree in Video Game Design and Development, deepening my skills in design and implementation to create immersive and engaging experiences.
ABOUT.BIO2: I enjoy collaborating in game jams and experimenting with new technologies and creative concepts under pressure.
ABOUT.SKILL2: Concepts: Object-Oriented Programming, Game Systems, VR, Design
ABOUT.SKILL3: Design Patterns: Object Pooling, Command, Strategy
